title: Savory Korean Peanut Grill
description: A midnight craving dish featuring smoky roasted peanuts, a creamy pasta‑water emulsion, and fresh raw toppings.
instructions: Cook the spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
Heat a large skillet over medium heat and toast the peanuts until fragrant, stirring constantly for 3 minutes.
In the same skillet, add sesame oil and pour in the 300ml water, bringing it to a gentle simmer.
Stir in gochujang, soy sauce, rice vinegar, minced garlic, and grated ginger, letting the mixture thicken into a thin sauce.
Add the cooked spaghetti to the skillet, tossing to coat it evenly with the sauce, and cook for another 2 minutes.
Sprinkle toasted sesame seeds over the pasta and remove from heat.
Transfer the pasta to a serving plate and scatter sliced green onion on top for a fresh finish.
Serve immediately while still warm, pairing with a small side of fresh cucumber slices if desired.
